The '''construction droid Mark II''' was a droid model used c. 3,951 BBY. It was a huge biped, stronger than the [[ET-74 communications droid|construction droid Mark I]] or [[construction droid foreman]], but far less dexterous. It was used for heavy lifting that the smaller droids couldn't accomplish. A typical construction team consisted of one foreman, one Mark II, and multiple Mark I droids.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
